calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Continued To Aug-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary Gemma O'Keefe, via ZOOM, for Norman Macleod, Executor.

Ms. O'Keefe reports that the refund from the IRS was approved in June of this year but that it has not been received yet. Ms. O'Keefe also reports that there is a reserve of $20,000 which will be held until July of 2022, to cover any additional expenses if needed.

The Status on Distribution of Reserve is continued to Aug-09-2022 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Ms. O'Keefe is instructed to file a report regarding the status of distribution, one week prior.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
